description: File changes made but no git commit in the tool call history
Commit message is generic (e.g., 'update files', 'fix bug', 'changes', 'misc')
Commit message uses unjustifiably definitive language like 'this ensures', 'this fixes', 'this guarantees'
Commit message describes what changed but not why — missing rationale or intent
Used git commit --amend instead of creating a new commit, potentially overwriting prior work
Used git push --force which can overwrite remote history
